2026-27 Men's Basketball Roster

55 Markece Young

  • Position Guard/Forward
  • Height 6-3
  • Class Redshirt Freshman
  • Hometown Dayton, OH
  • Highschool South Grand Prairie H.S.
  • Bio
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography

HIGH SCHOOL: A 2025 graduate of South Grand Prairie High School...averaged 14 points, six rebounds and four assists as a junior as he was named District MVP...averaged 11 points, five boards and three assists and shot over 40 percent from three his junior year...two-time First Team All-District selection.

  • 2026-27
